mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{newPassword} WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT password FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT users.id as id, nickname, submit_time as last_submit_time FROM users join submissions WHERE submit_time = (SELECT MAX(submit_time) FROM submissions)
SELECT u.id as user_id, nickname, avatar FROM users u INNER JOIN solved_problem_counts s ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE solved_count > 0 GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, role, created_at, nickname) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{createdAt}, #{nickname})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET punch_count = punch_count + 1, last_punch_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
